title: デビュー戦の後に・1本の電話

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... I'm back...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer... fetch me something to drink!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm granting you... the meritorious right... to
relieve me of my exhaustion. Now, quickly!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp... Ahhhh!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I've done it. I've made my debut. Now, I
can begin running as a professional.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But this was just the first step. My real journey
starts now.
Buzz, buzz.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My phone! Ugh... Now of all times! My speech was
just getting started!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...It's my mother.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
choice_data_list: I'll go out and let you talk.
I'll go out and let you talk.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Okay. I'll catch up with you when I'm finished.
Clunk.
Beep.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Good day.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, that's right. I made my debut. Is there a
problem?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Sure, my classmates were all excellent as
well, but I—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. It was the same talk as always.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"Why debut now? Everyone is so talented, they're
bound to crush you."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"You're too rash. Come home before you
embarrass yourself."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"Quit while you're ahead before you have to face
whether or not you lack talent."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I know the truth, hehe. She doesn't know what
she's talking about.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Not. At. All!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I've decided, Trainer! My next goal is to run a G1!
Each race has a grade, or a kind of level.

The grades are as follows from lowest to highest:
open, G3, G2, and then G1 at the top.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It only makes sense that a first-rate Umamusume
wins a G1. Besides, I want the popularity it will
bring. The adulation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And if I'm going to compete in the Classics next
year, it's standard that I get experience not just in
1,600-meter mile distance races, but medium
races as well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There is one logical course of direction. I must win
the Hopeful Stakes at the end of the year and
become the junior champion.

The Hopeful Stakes is a 2,000-meter
medium-distance race on turf.

Considering how similar it is in distance with one
of the Triple Crown's Classics, it's a good
stepping stone for the future.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
After I win that, going on to take the Triple
Crown won't be such a bad idea. Right, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Looks like we've got one heck of a journey
ahead.

Looks like we've got one heck of a journey
ahead.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It'll be so amazing that no one will be able to
deny its greatness.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And then, she'll finally understand...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That I never lacked talent to begin with.

Although she speaks with steeled confidence, her
eyes quiver with uncertainty.
